summary: Completed testing of Market Narrative Engine and MTF Alignment Engine implementation. All core features are working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: No V8_HISTORY_SCAN metadata found in responses
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Pattern detection still works via other engines

passed_tests: API /api/ta-engine/mtf/BTC?timeframes=1D returns narrative with short and full
API /api/ta-engine/mtf/BTC?timeframes=1D,4H returns mtf_context.alignment with direction and confidence
narrative.full contains pattern description when pattern exists
MTF Summary Bar shows one-line analysis
MTF Alignment Box shows direction and confidence
